steps.title: Use the requested order
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize when the two keepers began their careers. The notes show Whitmore started in 1867, while Barrow started in 1904, so the sentence must compare those start dates.

steps.title: Reject unrelated details
steps.content: A misplaces Barrow and focuses on navigability. B discusses lighthouse keepers generally. D compares end dates rather than start dates. The dates in the notes make the order clear: Whitmore started first, and Barrow started later. The only sentence that states Barrow began after Whitmore fits the goal. The answer is C.
